narrative:
Precinct Jennings (precinct in Van Wert County) has 452 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
